title: firewalld bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[1.3.4-15]
- fix(policy): rich: verify ipset exists

[1.3.4-14]
- fix(systemd): allow start code 251 (RUNNING_BUT_FAILED)

[1.3.4-13]
- fix(fw): start: remove ipset probe

[1.3.4-12]
- fix(systemd): verify firewalld is responsive to dbus

[1.3.4-11]
- test: add scale keyword to scale tests

[1.3.4-10]
- test(functions): fix iptables normalization for opt field
full_text:
[1.3.4-15]
- fix(policy): rich: verify ipset exists

[1.3.4-14]
- fix(systemd): allow start code 251 (RUNNING_BUT_FAILED)

[1.3.4-13]
- fix(fw): start: remove ipset probe

[1.3.4-12]
- fix(systemd): verify firewalld is responsive to dbus

[1.3.4-11]
- test: add scale keyword to scale tests

[1.3.4-10]
- test(functions): fix iptables normalization for opt field

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-19535.html
